## 1. Module Layout

```
citizen/                          # Project root
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ app/                          # Python backend (FastAPI)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ main.py                   # FastAPI entrypoint, lifespan, SQLite stamping

‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ intake.py             # 5 endpoints: start, message, get, restart, confirm

‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ db/

‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ rate_limit.py         # In-memory sliding window rate limiter
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ __init__.py
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ services/                 # 18 service modules
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ prompts.py            # Area-aware prompt registry (901 lines, v1.0.0)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ reasoning.py          # Triage + construction/verification/generation LLM calls
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ chat_reasoning.py     # Case-chat LLM calls
```

## 2. Pipeline Stages

The pipeline is defined in `app/core/pipeline.py` (Semantic Version 0.1.0).

### Stage Order (_STAGES list, line 115‚Äì125)

| # | Stage Name | Combined? |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `normalization` | Always separate |
| 2 | `classification` | Combined when `COMBINE_TRIAGE_STAGES=True` (default ON) |
| 3 | `decomposition` | ‚Üë |
| 4 | `retrieval` | Always separate |
| 5 | `construction` | Combined when `COMBINE_FINAL_STAGES=True` (default ON) |
| 6 | `verification` | ‚Üë |
| 7 | `generation` | ‚Üë |
| 8 | `adversarial_review` | Always separate |
| 9 | `calculation_check` | Always separate |

**Known issue:** Docstring (line 1) claims 8 stages with adversarial_review as stage 7.
Actual `_STAGES` list has 9 stages. The docstring is stale. Generation runs before
adversarial_review ‚Äî if reordered, adversarial injections would be overwritten.

### PipelineState (lines 57‚Äì108)
- `calculation_result: dict` field exists (stage 9 output)
- `legal_areas: list[str]` ‚Äî multi-area support
- `per_area_chunks: dict` ‚Äî per-area retrieval
- `stream_output_lines: list[str]` ‚Äî streaming progress

### Combined Stages
When `COMBINE_TRIAGE_STAGES=True`: stages 2‚Äì3 run as one LLM call
When `COMBINE_FINAL_STAGES=True`: stages 5‚Äì7 run as one LLM call

## 3. Database Schema

### ORM Models (13 total: Base + 12 domain)

| # | Model | Table | Key fields |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `LegalSource` | `legal_source` | source_type, title, jurisdiction, effective_date, version_hash |
| 2 | `LegalChunk` | `legal_chunk` | unit_type, hierarchy_path, text_content, legal_area |
| 3 | `ChunkEmbedding` | `chunk_embedding` | embedding (vector 1536), model_name |
| 4 | `CaseRun` | `case_run` | input_text, title, status, area, chat_history (JSONB) |
| 5 | `PipelineStageLog` | `pipeline_stage_log` | stage_name, status, payload (JSONB), duration_ms |
| 6 | `Claim` | `claim` | type, assessment, confidence, evidence_summary, user_adjudication (JSONB) |
| 7 | `CacheEntry` | `cache_entry` | key, value, expires_at |
| 8 | `EvidenceBinding` | `evidence_binding` | chunk_id ‚Üí claim_id, quote_text, relevance_score |
| 9 | `LegalParameter` | `legal_parameter` | parameter_key, numeric_value, valid_from, valid_to, review_status |
| 10 | `Conversation` | `conversation` | title, legal_area, archived |
| 11 | `ConversationMessage` | `conversation_message` | role, content |
| 12 | `IntakeSession` | `intake_session` | status, legal_areas, raw_context |
| 13 | `CaseRunArea` | `case_run_area` | case_run_id ‚Üí legal_area (many-to-many) |

### Migrations (7 total)
1. `001_init_schema.py` ‚Äî Core tables
2. `002_add_cache_entry.py` ‚Äî Cache table
3. `003_add_conversations.py` ‚Äî Conversation + messages + documents
4. `004_add_legal_parameter.py` ‚Äî Legal parameter store
5. `005_add_case_chat_fields.py` ‚Äî CaseRun chat/edits, Claim adjudication
6. `006_add_intake_and_legal_areas.py` ‚Äî IntakeSession, CaseRunArea, legal_area columns
7. `007_sqlite_baseline.py` ‚Äî SQLite baseline (different path)

**Known issue:** `STAGE_NAME_ALLOWED` constraint in `PipelineStageLog` omits
`adversarial_review` and `calculation_check` ‚Äî stage 8-9 logging silently breaks
the CHECK constraint. Needs migration 008.

### Source Types (16)
sgb1, sgb2, sgb3, sgb9, sgb12, sgbx, bgb, vwvfg, sgg, weisung, bsg,
erbstg, hoefev, kschg, burlg, tvg

### Legal Areas (9)
sozialrecht, erbrecht, schenkungsrecht, familienrecht, mietrecht,
arbeitsrecht, vertragsrecht, verwaltungsrecht, strafrecht, andere

## 4. Config Surface

`app/core/config.py` ‚Äî Settings singleton (51 env vars), lazily loaded via `__getattr__`.

Key groups:
- **LLM**: PRIMARY_MODEL (deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro), FALLBACK_MODEL_1/2, TRIAGE_MODEL, FINAL_MODEL, CALCULATION_MODEL, OPENROUTER_API_KEY
- **Embedding**: EMBEDDING_MODEL (openai/text-embedding-3-small), VECTOR_DIM (1536), EMBEDDING_API_KEY
- **Retrieval**: TOP_K_RETRIEVAL (10), MAX_COSINE_DISTANCE, RETRIEVAL_MODE (combined), RETRIEVAL_KEYWORD_FALLBACK (True)
- **Pipeline**: COMBINE_TRIAGE_STAGES (True), COMBINE_FINAL_STAGES (True), TOKEN_BUDGET limits
- **Timeouts**: PIPELINE_TIMEOUT_SEC (120), TRIAGE/FINAL/CALCULATION stage timeouts
- **Corpus**: CORPUS_SOURCES (default: ["sgb2","sgbx"]), CORPUS_INGESTION_TIMEOUT_SEC (900)
- **OCR**: OCR_DPI, OCR_JPG_QUALITY, ENABLE_OCR_LLM_SYNTHESIS (False), OCR_MAX_PAGES (10)
- **Calc**: ENABLE_CALCULATION_CHECK (True)
- **Rate limit**: RATE_LIMIT_REQUESTS (0 = disabled, desktop default)
- **Cache**: ENABLE_CACHE (True), CACHE_TTL_SEC (86400)
- **DB**: DATABASE_URL (default: sqlite+aiosqlite:///citizen.db), DATA_DIR, DB_POOL_SIZE

Version reporting: `get_app_version()` reads from `pyproject.toml` (current: 0.1.0).
Frontend `index.html` says v0.4.0 (independent versioning).

## 5. LLM Call Architecture (CRITICAL for WP-31)

Four discrete `OpenRouterClient` singletons, sharing the same `OpenRouterClient` class
from `app/core/router.py` but independently instantiated:

| Module | Variable | Initialization |
|---|---|---|
| `app/services/reasoning.py` | `_client` | Lazy `_get_client()` at line 52 |
| `app/services/chat_reasoning.py` | `_chat_client` | Lazy at line 213 |
| `app/services/intake.py` | `_client` | Lazy at line 59 |
| `app/services/case_chat.py` | `_client` | Lazy at line 366 |

`main.py` lifespan shutdown (lines 77‚Äì87) only closes reasoning and chat_reasoning
clients. Intake and case_chat clients are never closed (resource leak).

No single interception point exists for WP-31 egress guard. Client consolidation is
prerequisite (WP-00.5).

## 6. Frontend

- **index.html** v0.4.0 (525 lines): Three mode shell ‚Äî Analyze, Chat, Settings
- **app.js** v0.3.0 (3152 lines): SSE client, case chat, settings, intake session
- **style.css** v0.3.0 (2845 lines): Dark theme, responsive layout
- No frameworks, no build pipeline
- API calls via fetch(), SSE via EventSource
- Chat mode is active and functional (planned to park per D-5)

## 7. Test Coverage

- **Unit**: 21 files in `tests/unit/` ‚Äî no DB required
- **Integration**: 4 files in `tests/integration/` ‚Äî requires PostgreSQL + pgvector + alembic
- No CI automation (all checks manual)
- No eval framework

## 8. DevOps & Infrastructure

- **Docker**: docker-compose.yml + Dockerfile (multi-stage) exist and work
- **CI**: None (.github/workflows/ does not exist)
- **Git**: 71 commits, 0 tags, 0 releases
- **Electron**: Wrapper exists but parked (D-5)
- **PostgreSQL**: Required for production; SQLite path exists for dev

## 9. Key Service Dependencies

```
analyze API
  ‚Üí pipeline.py (orchestrator)
    ‚Üí prompts.py (area profile + stage builder)
    ‚Üí reasoning.py (LLM: triage + final)
    ‚Üí retrieval.py (pgvector + tsvector)
    ‚Üí verification.py (string-match verification)
    ‚Üí calculation.py (3-phase SGB II math)
    ‚Üí rules_engine.py (deterministic ¬ß11b)
    ‚Üí parameter_store.py (versioned legal params)
    ‚Üí audit.py (pipeline logging)
    ‚Üí router.py (OpenRouter API calls)
```
